ground_truth.title: Online Courses with Certificates - Grow with Google
ground_truth.main_content:
Google Career Certificates offer job ready skills you can put to work. Level up your career with flexible online training with hands-on experience and practical AI skills to stand out to employers in high-paying fields. The programs can be completed in 3-6 months with under 10 hours of flexible study per week, and no prior experience is required. 75% of certificate graduates report a positive career outcome such as new job, promotion, or raise within six months of completion. The median salary across certificate fields is $96,000+, with over 1.6 million job postings available.

Foundational Certificates include: Data Analytics (4.8 stars, 159,174 reviews), Project Management (4.9 stars, 121,054 reviews), Cybersecurity (4.8 stars, 46,535 reviews), Digital Marketing & E-commerce (4.8 stars, 35,362 reviews), IT Support (4.8 stars, 187,814 reviews), and UX Design (4.8 stars, 84,508 reviews).

Additional programs include Google Career Essentials for quick skill-building (Accelerate Your Job Search with AI, People Management Essentials, Prompting Essentials, Agile Essentials, AI Essentials), Advanced Google Career Certificates (Advanced Data Analytics, Business Intelligence, IT Automation with Python), and partner programs.

Certificate graduates gain access to CareerCircle for free career support including personalized coaching, mock interviews, and resume-building tools, plus exclusive job board access to connect with over 150 top employers including Bayer, Booz Allen Hamilton, Deloitte, Ford, Salesforce, Target, Verizon, and more.
with: Job ready skills you can put to work
Level up your career with flexible online training
Get professional job training from Google
Earn a credential that can help lead to jobs in high-paying fields
75% of certificate graduates report a positive career outcome within six months of completion
